# Quinton Hill Concierge Services

> Uganda's premier business concierge — simplifying business registration, travel, relocation, and investment in Kampala.

Quinton Hill Concierge is a professional concierge and advisory firm based in Kololo, Kampala, Uganda. Founded by Quinton Hill, the company has served 200+ clients across Uganda and East Africa with a 98% satisfaction rate and a 24-hour response guarantee.

Contact: hello@quintonhill.co.ug | +256 770 972 956 | +256 708 647 752
Address: Plot 14, Acacia Avenue, Kololo, Kampala, Uganda

## Core Services

- Business Registration & Corporate Compliance: Company registration, trading licences, tax setup, URA registration, annual returns, compliance monitoring via URSB
- Travel & Immigration Services: Passport applications, visa support, police clearances, flight booking, hotel reservations, airport meet & greet, travel itinerary planning
- Relocation Services: Housing search, banking setup, school enrollment, local orientation, lifestyle integration for individuals, families, and corporations relocating to Uganda
- Investment Due Diligence & Business Verification: Company verification, director checks, financial due diligence, site visits, Investor Confidence Report™
- Concierge & Lifestyle Management: Executive PA services, appointment scheduling, document coordination, VIP concierge, corporate event planning

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://quintonhill.co.ug/): Overview of services, client testimonials, why Quinton Hill
- [Services](https://quintonhill.co.ug/services): Full list of concierge and advisory services with detailed breakdowns
- [About](https://quintonhill.co.ug/about): Company mission, team, values, and 10+ years of local expertise
- [Our Process](https://quintonhill.co.ug/process): How we work — consultation, planning, execution, reporting
- [Client Stories](https://quintonhill.co.ug/clients): Testimonials and case studies from 200+ clients
- [Contact](https://quintonhill.co.ug/contact): Enquiry form, office hours, and direct contact details

## Who We Serve

Entrepreneurs and startups launching in Uganda, foreign investors entering the East African market, INGOs and NGOs requiring compliance and event support, corporate executives relocating to Kampala, and expatriates needing lifestyle and administrative management.

## Credentials

- 10+ years of local expertise in Uganda's business environment
- Deep relationships with URSB, URA, and Ugandan regulatory bodies
- 200+ businesses, individuals, and organisations served
- 98% client satisfaction rate
- 24-hour guaranteed response time
